creator: frank.josellis@unix.net
text:
To reproduce the warning on a stock FreeBSD system, proceed as follows:

- create a new user (root's account is not affected)

- send a mail to that user (need a non-void INBOX) 

- login as the new user

- invoke pine

The warning message shows up after the initial greeting screen and will be 
visible for about 5 seconds. Read the previously mentioned FAQ document to 
understand what's going on.
